Our Story

Born from 113A York Place — our Dunedin flat.

We deliver experienced, cost-effective marketing solutions for Kiwi SMEs.

Born from humble beginnings at the Otago Business School and our Dunedin student flat. We operate as a hybrid-remote agency, with consultants in Wellington & Christchurch.

Partner with us for one-off or monthly support, with no strings attached.

What We Offer

Our Products

Explore our range of digital marketing products designed to help Kiwi businesses grow online.

Content Manager is an AI-powered social media management platform designed to help marketing teams plan, create, and schedule social media content in one streamlined workspace.

Combining AI copy generation, content ideation, and multi-platform scheduling, it enables teams to produce on-brand content faster, collaborate with clients, and manage campaigns efficiently from a single dashboard.
